title: Burden of Proof for Crime or Wrongdoing
text: The party claiming that a person is guilty of crime or wrongdoing has the burden of proof on that issue.
notes: Allocates the burden of proof to the party asserting crime or wrongdoing.

structure.division_title: Burden of Proof; Burden of Producing Evidence; Presumptions and Inferences
structure.article_title: Burden of Proof on Specific Issues
